name.doc: App display name in headers + about screen

tagline.text: Your neighbourhood, your tasks, your files — one chat.

placeholder.text: Type a slash command or message…

active_thread.doc: a11y label on the active-thread title

thinking.doc: Placeholder shown while a dispatched skill is in flight

unknown_input.doc: Bot reply when parseInput returns kind:'unknown' (non-slash or unmatched slash)

dispatch_error.doc: Generic fallback when resolveDispatch returns an error shape

list_summary.doc: Header for list replies (until step 2 ships per-item inline keyboards)

canopy_chat_op_pending.text: /{{opId}} is a chat-shell command — not wired on mobile yet.
canopy_chat_op_pending.doc: Shown when the user invokes a canopy-chat-host op (/help, /threads, /settings, …) that webMain routes via localBuiltins; the RN port is a later #253 sub-step

list_empty.doc: Shown inside a list-kind bubble when items is empty

button_tap.doc: Synthetic user-bubble shown when a row button is tapped (#253 step 2 — label is the button label, item the targeted item id)

followup_prompt.doc: Generic fallback prompt when a row-tap dispatch returns needsForm and the op doesn't have an op-specific entry in pickPromptKey (#253 step 4)

followup_prompt_respond_to_item_body.doc: Friendlier prompt for [Help with] on a stoop post (respondToItem.body) — picked via pickPromptKey in src/core/followUp.js

chat.doc: Bottom-tab label for the main chat view

threads.doc: Bottom-tab label for the thread sidebar

settings.doc: Bottom-tab label for the settings screen

loading.doc: Shown while the in-process bundle composes

boot_failed.doc: Error banner when agentBundle throws; {{message}} interpolated

transport_ready.doc: Shown when NknTransport completes its initial connect

agent_wiring_failed.doc: Shown when createRealHouseholdAgent throws on V1 boot

shell_stub_intro.doc: Placeholder body until ChatScreen renders real content

fab_a11y.doc: Accessibility label for the bottom-right slash FAB (#241)

modal_placeholder.doc: Placeholder shown inside the slash-FAB's TextInput when empty

row_ago.doc: Per-row staleness badge on list items (renderer.js → formatLastSync; {{ago}} comes pre-formatted as '2h' / '30m' / etc. via relativeAgo)

saved_locally.doc: Decentralized sync hint when 0 peers are reachable yet

synced_to.doc: Decentralized sync hint — N of M peers confirmed

pending.doc: Decentralized sync hint — count of peers not yet confirmed

unreachable.doc: Decentralized sync hint — count + comma-separated WebIDs

podless_empty.doc: Pod-less sync hint — empty lastSeen map

podless.doc: Pod-less sync hint — count + relative-ago of oldest peer
